title: Issue Designing Custom Action
excerpt: I am wanting to create this visually in the automations but do not even know where to start I know how to create the action and make it do what I want but, I do not know how to create the feature and get it to show up…

posts.author: p3rson101 (Chad Canady)
posts.cookedHtml:
image554×402 22.3 KB

I am wanting to create this visually in the automations but do not even know where to start I know how to create the action and make it do what I want but, I do not know how to create the feature and get it to show up correctly in the recipe. I am creating it where the users can use tokens for the columns, and I can call the boardID to auto populate those tokens , then the user can select them and add text this will be a template style for the name of the item created so that we can automate the name creation to easily identify or setup automations to move these where we need.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you provide a bit more of what you’re hoping to achieve? I’m not fully understanding…

posts.author: p3rson101 (Chad Canady)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, was wanting to create a custom Recipe action so users could select trigger when Item is created, then select my custom action which will take a formula which i want to have custom box like the image above that populates the column tokens and then they can create their formula then on the backend my code takes that formula and puts it into the item name.

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @p3rson101 ,

If I understand correctly, your best option is the ‘message’ field type what you can use in the custom action. It will allow the user to input text with column mapping like this

image1008×954 44.7 KB

posts.author: p3rson101 (Chad Canady)
posts.cookedHtml: Will try this today thanks for the fast response
